name: Marcus Vance
description: Enthusiastic food enthusiast who loves hunting down local diner breakfast specials and the ultimate smash burgers. Always ready for a friendly chat about movies and classic cars.

name: Elena Rostova
description: A seasoned neighborhood foodie with a deep love for farm-to-table casual dining and authentic food truck finds. Enjoys lively conversations regarding architecture, books, and gardening.

name: Devon Miller
description: Late-night fast-food connoisseur who knows exactly where to find the crispest fries in the city. Always down for spontaneous coffee runs, casual table talk, and sharing new indie music tracks.

name: Amina Yusuf
description: Passionate about exploring diverse global flavors, street food markets, and local family-run cafes. Brings warmth, an inviting smile, and great listening skills to any dinner table.

name: Arthur Pendelton
description: A warm and well-spoken companion who enjoys peaceful sit-down dinners, traditional family bistros, and classic desserts. Excellent at keeping lighthearted, pleasant conversations going over a great meal.
